title: Rich Garlicky Russian Egg Frittata
description: A garlicky and rich Russian dish featuring melted butter and a glassy-jelly texture, perfect for a quick-fix breakfast or snack
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit
In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs, salt, and pepper until well combined
In a separate saucepan, melt the butter over low heat in a bain-marie
Add the minced garlic to the melted butter and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly
Add the garlic butter mixture to the eggs and whisk until well combined
Pour the egg mixture into a greased 9-inch pie plate or skillet
If using cheese and parsley, sprinkle them on top of the egg mixture
Bake the frittata for 25-30 minutes, or until the edges are golden brown and the center is set
Remove the frittata from the oven and let it cool for 5 minutes before slicing and serving
